name: pdf_convert
description: Convert an HTML string or a URL to a PDF document. Supports advanced options including custom headers/footers, margins, page sizes, landscape orientation, JavaScript execution delay, watermarks, password protection, and PDF/A compliance. Returns binary PDF or a JSON response with a URL.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: URL or HTML string to convert. PDFShift auto-detects whether it is a URL or HTML.

parameters.name: landscape
parameters.description: Set to true for landscape orientation. Default: false.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Page format (e.g., 'A4', 'Letter') or custom '{width}x{height}' with units. Default: 'A4'.

parameters.name: css
parameters.description: Additional CSS rules or URL to a CSS file.

parameters.name: javascript
parameters.description: JavaScript code to execute or URL to a JS file before conversion.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Delay in milliseconds before conversion (0-10000). Default: 0.

parameters.name: sandbox
parameters.description: Generate a test PDF that does not count against credits. Default: false.

parameters.name: encode
parameters.description: Return Base64-encoded content instead of binary. Default: false.

parameters.name: webhook
parameters.description: URL for async callback when conversion completes.

parameters.name: s3_destination
parameters.description: S3 bucket path to store the generated PDF.

parameters.name: watermark
parameters.description: Watermark configuration: text or image with position and opacity.
